시편 19:1.content: The heavens declare the glory of God. The expanse shows his handiwork.

시편 19:2.content: Day after day they pour out speech, and night after night they display knowledge.

시편 19:3.content: There is no speech nor language, where their voice is not heard.

시편 19:4.content: Their voice has gone out through all the earth, their words to the end of the world. In them he has set a tent for the sun,

시편 19:5.content: which is as a bridegroom coming out of his room, like a strong man rejoicing to run his course.

시편 19:6.content: His going out is from the end of the heavens, his circuit to its ends. There is nothing hidden from its heat.

시편 19:7.content: Yahweh’s law is perfect, restoring the soul. Yahweh’s covenant is sure, making wise the simple.

시편 19:8.content: Yahweh’s precepts are right, rejoicing the heart. Yahweh’s commandment is pure, enlightening the eyes.

시편 19:9.content: The fear of Yahweh is clean, enduring forever. Yahweh’s ordinances are true, and righteous altogether.

시편 19:10.content: They are more to be desired than gold, yes, than much fine gold, sweeter also than honey and the extract of the honeycomb.

시편 19:11.content: Moreover your servant is warned by them. In keeping them there is great reward.

시편 19:12.content: Who can discern his errors? Forgive me from hidden errors.

시편 19:13.content: Keep back your servant also from presumptuous sins. Let them not have dominion over me. Then I will be upright. I will be blameless and innocent of great transgression.

시편 19:14.content: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight, Yahweh, my rock, and my redeemer.
